title: Rich Light Polish Salt Cod Stir-fry
description: A rich and light Polish dish featuring slow-cooked salt cod in a simple sauce made without eggs for a solo-dinner option.
instructions: Clean and gently simmer the salt cod in water for about 30 minutes.
Chop the onion into thin strips, mince the garlic, and finely chop thyme leaves.
In a wok or large skillet, heat some oil over medium heat. Add onions and cook until translucent.
Add minced garlic and red pepper flakes to the wok, stir-fry for about 1 minute.
Gently add the cooked salt cod and chopped thyme to the wok. Pour in water while stirring continuously to avoid sticking.
Simmer for another 5-7 minutes until all ingredients are evenly coated with sauce and the liquid has reduced slightly.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
